en.extract:
Hunter's cisticola (Cisticola hunteri) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae.
It is found in Kenya, Tanzania, and Uganda.
Its natural habitats are tropical moist montane and high-elevation shrubland.  It is a dueting species.

'''Hunter's cisticola''' ('''''Cisticola hunteri''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cisticolidae]].
It is found in [[Kenya]], [[Tanzania]], and [[Uganda]].
Its natural [[habitat]]s are tropical moist [[montane]] and high-elevation [[shrubland]].  It is a dueting species.<ref>{{cite journal |author=W.H. Thorpe |title=Duetting and antiphonal song in birds.  |journal=Behaviour. Supplement |volume=18  |year=1972 |pages=1–193 |jstor=30039182}}</ref><ref>{{cite journal |author=.D. Todt |title=Die antiphonen Paargesänge des ostafrikanischen Grassängers Cisticola hunteri prinioides Neumann.  |journal=J. Ornithol. |volume=111 |year=1970 |issue=3–4 |pages=332–356|doi=10.1007/BF01653397 |s2cid=41070518 }}</ref>
